_contract: Executor may change ONLY 'passes' and 'evidence'. Flipping passes to true requires evidence (test name or file:line) in the same edit. Removing, rewording, reordering, or adding criteria is tampering: Verifier FAIL regardless of code quality. Criteria change only in planning, with the human.

criteria.text: flutter doctor exits 0 for Android + web toolchains (captured output)
flutter build web and flutter build apk --debug both exit 0
App launches showing a Tapestry placeholder screen (screenshot)
mkdir __forge_canary__ is BLOCKED in a Claude Code session (guard proof)
CI runs analyze + test green on push (link to run)
Secrets pattern gitignored from commit zero
dart run tool/build_db.dart exits 0 and writes assets/bible.db
DB contains 66 books and >= 31000 BSB verses (captured query output)
John 3:16 query returns BSB text containing 'only begotten' or 'one and only'
Every verse maps to exactly one passage; Isaiah 53:5 passage spans within Isa 52:13-53:12 with a heading
Top-weighted edge from the Isaiah 53 passage points to a New Testament passage
No orphan edges (asserted by test)
Isaiah 53 reachable in <=3 taps from launch; heading + full text shown (screenshot)
Prev/next moves exactly one passage incl. Genesis-start and Malachi-end boundaries (test + screenshots)
Airplane-mode Android launch renders a passage normally (screenshot)
Web build renders the same passage in a browser (screenshot)
Isaiah 53 constellation shows >=5 neighbours incl. at least one Gospel passage (screenshot)
Layout deterministic: identical screenshots across two runs (golden test)
Tapping a neighbour recenters graph AND updates reader pane (test + before/after screenshots)
No dead taps across the 50 highest-degree passages (test)
Tap targets >=44dp; labels legible at default font scale (screenshot judged)
Mocked parallel view aligns BSB/NIV verse-by-verse for Romans 8 (screenshot)
Mocked NIV omitting Matt 17:21 renders footnote marker; tap reveals note (both screenshots)
No API key configured -> BSB-only mode with plain explanation, no crash (screenshot)
No live network call in any test or gate step (battery passes with network disabled)
API key absent from repo and logs (grep proof in gate output)
flutter build apk --release exits 0; human confirms install + launch on phone (HANDOFF record)
Deployed URL loads reader with zero JS errors; capture asserts deployed origin
Airplane-mode phone use reads BSB end-to-end (human-verified)
About screen shows OpenBible CC-BY, BSB, and API.Bible attributions (screenshot)
